title: Streetwear + jewelry stacking: the clean rules
excerpt: Three rules that make stacks look premium on-camera: spacing, finish, and anchors.

sections.heading: Spacing
sections.body: Separate lengths so each piece reads. If chains overlap, the shine turns into noise.

sections.heading: Finish consistency
sections.body: Keep finishes consistent within a look. Mixed tones can work, but only with intent and a clear anchor.

sections.heading: One anchor piece
sections.body: Choose one statement (chain or ring) and keep the rest supporting. Premium styling is restraint.

cta.heading: Obsidian Chain Necklace
cta.body: The anchor piece designed to look premium on tees and hoodies.
